summary: High‑quality audience tape captures a fiery Lost Sailor > Saint > Deal medley and tight Ramble On Rose, with the band on fire all night.
review: The recording – an audience source praised for its surprisingly clear sound – delivers one of the hottest Lost Sailor > Saint > Deal jams ever heard, plus a scorching Ramble On Rose and a kicking Shakedown Street. Reviewers rave that the first set was “incredible” and the band was fully on‑the‑money throughout.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently enthusiastic reviews highlight a standout performance (show rating ~4.5) and good‑to‑excellent audience recording quality (~4.0), yielding an overall weighted score around 4.3.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Audience tape but praised for high sound quality; clear enough to hear Jerry’s guitar shredding and tight band interplay despite typical ambient noise.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set described as incredible; second set opened strong with a kicking Shakedown Street, maintaining high energy throughout.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Multiple reviewers note Jerry’s “belting” and nonstop shredding during the Deal jam.
